data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying clients about new provider details. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that such notifications are sent to clients when a provider change occurs. The linked use case explicitly states the need for client notifications, but there is no evidence of this functionality being implemented or executed in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of client notifications being sent with new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
